name: Gami Discord Recruitment
description: Discord member scanning and DM conversation manager for Gami gaming platform. Uses browser-based Discord access and local LLM for private conversations.

maxDmTurns.description: Max AI turns per DM conversation before human takeover (default: 5)

takeoverMessage.description: Message to send to user when handing over to human agent

takeoverMessage.label: Human Takeover Message
takeoverMessage.placeholder: 感谢您的耐心！人工客服将接管后续沟通。
